text: Exfoliates the skin. It is said to prevent or treat acne and acne scars. whether this is true is questionable. the drug induced some dryness and flakiness especially around the nose area and chin area. this side effect can go away after a while the product is a gel that is put on every night. it supposedly prevents new blemishes and promotes exfoliation. the results for the blemishes were not satisfactory.
